title: StaffAI Platform 1.0 Gap Closure Sprint
source_docs: ai员工管理系统开发计划.md

stories.title: L1/L2/L3 Memory Layer full integration - wire into task execution path
acceptanceCriteria: MemoryLayerService.loadMemory() called during task execution with policy from context
MemoryLayerService.writeback() called after task completion with summary
L1 context loaded as ephemeral session context, L2 loaded as project knowledge
Task detail page shows memory context section with loaded entries
Integration test: task execution loads L1+L2 and writes back to L2
Backend builds with zero errors

stories.title: Squad Mode structured roles (Commander/Executor/Critic)
acceptanceCriteria: SquadRole type defined: 'commander' | 'executor' | 'critic' | 'coordinator'
squad-templates.ts defines preset squad configurations (dev-team, research-team, review-team)
POST /api/squad/create accepts template name and creates structured squad
DiscussionControlPanel shows squad member roles (not just agent names)
Squad discussion follows commander -> executor -> critic flow
Backend builds with zero errors

stories.title: Budget circuit breaker - cost tracking with automatic shutoff
acceptanceCriteria: BudgetConfig type with maxTokens, maxCostUsd, warningThresholdPct fields
BudgetService.checkBudget(taskId) compares accumulated cost vs budget limit
ExecutionService checks budget before each step; suspends task if over limit
Budget warning event emitted when 80% threshold reached
Task detail page shows budget usage bar (spent/limit)
Backend builds with zero errors

stories.title: Self-healing: checkpoint-based auto-restart on failure
acceptanceCriteria: On execution failure, WorkflowExecutionEngine auto-retries from last checkpoint (max 3 times)
If retry fails, auto-reassign to alternative agent (if available) with same role
ExecutionTraceEvent records 'auto_retry' and 'agent_replacement' events
Task detail page shows retry count and replacement history
Backend builds with zero errors

stories.title: HITL thought chain display in approval UI
acceptanceCriteria: Execution trace events include 'thought' type with reasoning content
SuspendedTaskPanel displays thought chain (collapsible sections)
Approval page shows AI reasoning summary before approve/reject buttons
Human can see chain-of-thought that led to suspension
Frontend builds with zero errors

stories.title: Multi-step approval chain (Step 1 -> Step 2 -> Step 3)
acceptanceCriteria: ApprovalChain type defined with ordered steps (role, required, auto_approve_if_low_risk)
Risk level HIGH triggers multi-step chain; MEDIUM triggers single-step
Each step must be approved before task progresses to next approval step
Approval detail page shows chain progress (Step 1 done, Step 2 pending)
Backend builds with zero errors

stories.title: Tower View (Dashboard strategic control tower)
acceptanceCriteria: New route /tower with TowerViewPage component
Shows: active task count by status, total cost, agent utilization chart
Shows: recent execution heatmap (tasks per hour/day)
Shows: risk distribution pie chart
Navigation includes Tower link
Frontend builds with zero errors
